original: Your codex beeps, notifying you that you’re pregnant. Based on the readouts, you’re almost assuredly carrying Zephyr’s child. You give a little sigh of happiness, thinking about how thrilled your lover will be to have an addition to your
- she sure seems to love putting them inside you, after all..
You can barely wait to tell her the news in person, quickly pulling out your codex and hammering out a little message to her.

Your codex beeps, notifying you of progress in your pregnancy. It looks like you’re carrying at least twins and maybe more! Thinking back to exactly how ‘thorough’ Zephyr was and is, you’re not exactly surprised. You pet your swelling tummy and think about the future.

Your tummy has grown quite a lot since your last codex notification, and by now you’re pretty certain that if it is only twins, they’re very large. You’ll have to wait and see, but you have an inkling of what’s to come.

You wince a little as you feel a kick from your very pregnant belly, idly putting a hand on it and stroking. It’s been a bit more difficult to get around as large as you are, but you’ve been managing. You take a moment to think fondly about Zephyr and how much she’ll love having"+({var0}?" more":"")+" kids while you rub your tummy.

original: Your codex beeps, notifying you of progress in your pregnancy. You should make it to the Nursery as soon as you can!
Your codex beeps, notifying you of progress in your pregnancy. You should make it to the Nursery as soon as you can!
